sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19468" key="baru/ploutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰρύ-πλουτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19468.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very wealthy,</tr_> Nic.Dam.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:p.144D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.144D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
